summary: Use the published library import path as the Go module and internal import path.
reason: The generated package kept the local binary module name, but the published catalog supply-chain verifier requires new CLI modules to live under github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library/library/<category>/<slug>. Internal package imports must move with go.mod so the package still builds.
reprint_guard: When packaging into the public library, keep go.mod module paths canonical to the destination library directory instead of the local binary name.
